experiment: BF16 GEMM scaling on single AIE2P tile via Peano
toolchain: IRON + Peano + aie_api/aie.hpp (public AIE API vector intrinsics) — open-source, no Chess
conclusion: Open-source GEMM on 1 AIE2P tile using aie::mmul<8,8,8,bf16,bf16,accfloat> intrinsics compiled via Peano. Performance is DMA-bound at small sizes; larger tiles improve efficiency. True multi-tile (Worker.grid) requires a newer version of IRON (present in Xilinx/mlir-aie source but absent from the installed 1.3.2 wheel). The Chess reference (30.1 TFLOPS) uses the SAME intrinsics via Worker.grid on 32 tiles.
